title: Tata Steel is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Tata Steel is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Quality Control Engineer with drive and ambition, Tata Steel in Delhi is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Tata Steel:
Tata Steel is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in ISO 9001

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Steel!
